claim_text: S2 2030 annual transition cost is 7.273 BUSD/yr.
S2 2050 annual transition cost is 25.043 BUSD/yr.
Electricity-centered pathways require 146.034 TWh/yr added electricity in 2050.
Hydrogen-centered pathways require 4.546 Mt/yr hydrogen in 2050.
Hydrogen-centered pathways require 32.380 TWh/yr added electricity in 2050.
S3 incurs 16.994 BUSD/yr cost premium over S2 in 2050.
